summary: The stock has mixed signals, with positive momentum from the 12-day EMA and recent trading volume, but also signs of weakening momentum and negative return momentum.
bullish_factors: The 12-day EMA is above the 26-day EMA, supporting positive momentum.
Recent trading volume is meaningfully above its 20-day average.
bearish_factors: Price is below the 20-day moving average.
MACD is below its signal line, indicating weakening momentum.
The stock has negative 5-day return momentum.
The stock has negative 20-day return momentum.
